rule_metadata.author: Adithya Chandra and Sushant Kumar Arya, Trellix
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Process Injection to Explorer

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Process Injection to Explorer
id: ddef6008-8465-4ce6-b2ec-4e8ffef62a9a
status: experimental
description: Detects the suspicious child process of regsvr32
references:
- https://www.trellix.com/en-us/about/newsroom/stories/research/demystifying-qbot-malware.html
author: Adithya Chandra and Sushant Kumar Arya, Trellix
date: 2022/04/08
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \regsvr32.exe
    Image|endswith: \explorer.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
